title: Champagne Waltz
writer: Frank Butler, Don Hartman, H.S. Kraft
actors: Gladys Swarthout, Fred MacMurray, Jack Oakie
plot: Champagne Waltz is one of five movies produced by Paramount in the 1930s featuring Gladys Swarthout, a very popular Metropolitan Opera mezzo-soprano. The studio was attempting to build on the popularity of Grace Moore, another ope...
